global.description: The ad features a modern design with abstract shapes and bold text.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A large rectangular shape with a smaller circular shape overlapping it, both in a light green color.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A larger rectangular shape in the center, filled with a light green color, creating a modern and minimalistic look.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: A small circular shape in light green, positioned towards the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: main message
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Secure & simple No hidden fees' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: The word 'VaultRun' in bold, white text with a green background, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A prominent black button with white text saying 'Order now' located at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalistic with bright colors, secure service, VaultRun.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Secure & simple, No hidden fees, VaultRun, Order now
